title: Delete Account
description: Please read the following carefully before deleting your Wellsy account. Deleted data cannot be recovered.
warningItems: All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
If you want to remove content from groups, please delete it yourself before deleting your account.
If you have a future premium subscription, cancel it in your device's App Store or Google Play before deleting.
deletedDataNote: Deleting your account triggers Cloud Functions (deleteUserData), which removes the following data from Firebase (Cloud Firestore & Storage).

deletedData.label: Food logs
deletedData.detail: Meal name, ingredients, calories, macros, AI comments, notes

deletedData.label: Account info
deletedData.detail: Display name, email, profile picture, settings

deletedData.label: Group data
deletedData.detail: Group posts, comments, reactions (including selfie photos), group settings

deletedData.label: Reports & blocks
deletedData.detail: Reported content IDs, blocked user IDs

deletedData.label: Streak data
deletedData.detail: Consecutive logging count and streak credits

groupNoteItems: Group posts are auto-deleted after 24 h. Account deletion also triggers cleanup.
Comments, reactions, and selfie photos are also deleted.
We recommend deleting your group content before deleting your account.
Your display name and icon will be removed from group member lists.
stepsTitle: How to delete your account in-app
stepsIos: Open Wellsy and tap the Profile tab at the bottom.
Tap the Settings icon (gear) in the top-right corner.
Review the confirmation dialog and tap Delete.
You will be signed out automatically once deletion is complete.
stepsAndroid: Open Wellsy and tap the Profile tab at the bottom.
Tap the Settings icon (gear) in the top-right corner.
Review the confirmation dialog and tap Delete.
You will be signed out automatically once deletion is complete.
contactBody: If you cannot access the app, email us with your registered email address and a request to delete your account. We aim to respond within 3–5 business days.
timelineItems: Immediately: Firebase Authentication credentials are invalidated.
After confirmation: Cloud Functions (deleteUserData) begin removing Firestore and Storage data.
Data required by applicable law is retained as legally required.
privacyLinkText: See Privacy Policy § 10 (Account Deletion & Data Removal)
